name: lms-pesv-education
description: LMS PESV Education — Sistema de Gestión de Aprendizaje

scripts.init: pnpm install && pnpm --filter api exec prisma generate
scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k -n api,client -c green,cyan "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:client"
scripts.build: concurrently --success all -n api,client -c green,cyan "pnpm run build:api" "pnpm run build:client"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,client -c green,cyan "pnpm run start:api" "pnpm run start:client"
scripts.db:push: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter api exec prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
scripts.typecheck: concurrently --success all "pnpm --filter api exec tsc --noEmit" "pnpm --filter client exec tsc --noEmit"
